long_description:
[COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A kube-proxy-dkfzp is not ready for the past 10 minutes
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge:node:dal1-qz6-sr6-rk053-s38
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1 = 0.96
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge' and kube_pod_name = 'kube-proxy-dkfzp'

Time:             12/04/2025 11:21 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179428013%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE]
Description:  Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready kube-proxy pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1
Duration: 0 ns
